history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A person wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, dark pants, and a black helmet rides a gray scooter on an asphalt road. The scooter has a camouflage backpack strapped to the back and red "FRAGILE" stickers on its side. The number "022" is also visible on the rear of the scooter. The background shows a blurred urban environment with trees and buildings, suggesting a sunny day with bright lighting and a natural color palette. The mood is dynamic and captures a moment of everyday urban transit.
